scripts.check:all: npm run check:site && npm run check:generated && npm run check:site-js-version
scripts.generate:all: npm run generate:schools && npm run generate:archive && npm run generate:sitemap && npm run generate:search
scripts.maintenance:bump-site-js:check: npm run maintenance:bump-site-js -- 89 && npm run check:site-js-version
scripts.maintenance:site-js-cache: npm run report:site-js-version && npm run maintenance:bump-site-js:dry-run && npm run maintenance:bump-site-js:check && npm run report:site-js-version && npm run check:all
